<style>
.tab {
    display: inline-block;
    margin-left: 8em;
}
.title-slide .remark-slide-number {
  display: none;
}

.title-slide {
  background-image: url("images/title.png");
  background-size: cover;
}
</style>

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(knitr)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(kableExtra)
library(fontawesome)
library(metathis)

options(
    htmltools.dir.version = FALSE,
    knitr.table.format = "html",
    knitr.kable.NA = '',
    dplyr.width = Inf,
    width = 250
)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
    warning = FALSE,
    message = FALSE,
    fig.path = "figs/",
    fig.width = 7.252,
    fig.height = 4,
    comment = "#>",
    fig.retina = 3
)

# Setup xaringanExtra options
xaringanExtra::use_xaringan_extra(c(
  "tile_view", "panelset", "share_again"))
xaringanExtra::style_share_again(share_buttons = "none")
xaringanExtra::use_extra_styles(
  hover_code_line = TRUE,
  mute_unhighlighted_code = FALSE
)

# Set up website metadata
meta() %>%
  meta_general(
    description = rmarkdown::metadata$subtitle,
    generator = "xaringan and remark.js"
  ) %>%
  meta_name("github-repo" = "jhelvy/2026-cosmos-club") %>%
  meta_social(
    title = rmarkdown::metadata$title,
    url = "https://jhelvy.com/slides",
    og_type = "website",
    og_author = "John Paul Helveston",
    twitter_card_type = "summary_large_image",
    twitter_creator = "@jphelveston"
  )

# Vehicle listings summary table
summary_dt_raw <- read_csv(here('data', 'listings_summary.csv')) %>% 
   filter(vehicle_type %in% c('car', 'cuv', 'suv')) %>% 
    filter(powertrain %in% c('cv', 'hev', 'bev', 'phev')) %>% 
    mutate(
        vehicle_type = ifelse(vehicle_type == 'cuv', 'suv', vehicle_type),
        vehicle_type = ifelse(vehicle_type == 'car', 'Car', 'SUV')
    ) %>% 
    group_by(powertrain, vehicle_type, inventory_type) %>% 
    summarise(n = sum(n)) %>% 
    ungroup() %>% 
    mutate(n = round(n / 10^6, 1))

total_listings <- sum(summary_dt_raw$n) 
summary_dt <- summary_dt_raw %>%
    pivot_wider(
        names_from = powertrain,
        values_from = n
    ) %>% 
    select(
        Type = vehicle_type,
        Conventional = cv, 
        Hybrid = hev, 
        PHEV = phev, 
        BEV = bev, 
        inventory_type
    ) %>% 
    mutate(PHEV = ifelse(is.na(PHEV), 0, PHEV)) %>% 
    rename(ICEV = Conventional, HEV = Hybrid)
```
